reviews.comment:
Cargan nafta de dudosa reputación jajaja

(Translated by Google)
They fill up with gasoline of dubious reputation, hahaha
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OVlxbk5REAE

reviews.comment:
Lenta la atención.  No siempre tienen nafta. Largas colas para cargar.  La única estación de la zona sin tener que llegar a Mar del Plata.
No siempre le anda la serviclub.  Lo bueno es que si tienen para controlar el aire de las cubiertas

(Translated by Google)
Slow service. They don't always have gas. Long lines to fill up. The only station in the area without having to go all the way to Mar del Plata. The service station isn't always working. The good thing is that they do have a tire pressure checker.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3aThfYllREAE
